preamble: Palatal glides may shift to labio-velar glides, often involving rounding and backing in specific phonetic environments.

examples.note: Contextual rounding where palatal glides shift toward labio-velar articulation.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
